title: Fairness Auditing in Tabular Machine Learning: A Multi-Dataset Benchmark of Bias, Mitigation, and Robustness
description: Final Q1 submission reproducibility package for the manuscript Fairness Auditing in Tabular Machine Learning: A Multi-Dataset Benchmark of Bias, Mitigation, and Robustness. This release includes processed outputs, analysis code, SAM-Fair selection scripts, robustness checks, XGBoost-EG probe outputs, subgroup sensitivity outputs, optional sensitivity analyses, supplementary tables, figures, and reproducibility materials.
